About Organization

The Indian Air Force is the air arm of the Indian Armed Forces. It is responsible for securing Indian airspace and conducting aerial warfare during conflicts.
The Indian Air Force is a highly respected and professional organization that plays a critical role in maintaining India's national security.

About the Programme

The Air Force Agniveer Vayu Musician programme is a recruitment drive by the Indian Air Force to select eligible candidates for the position of Musician.
The programme aims to provide an opportunity for young and talented individuals to serve the nation with pride and contribute to the rich musical heritage of the Indian Air Force.
